summary:
The primary method utilized in modern gene editing involves employing CRISPR technology due to its precision and adaptability compared to earlier methods such as ZFN or TALENs; however, challenges persist concerning efficiency and specificity that are actively being addressed through research advancements.
To directly answer your query about identifying one particular tool from among those mentioned options without delving into comparative analysis beyond what was already provided above—CRISPR would stand out based solely upon widespread recognition within scientific literature pertaining specifically towards contemporary applications involving direct manipulation at genomic level via targeted cleavage mechanisms enabled thereby. Agent1 concludes confidently after reviewing multiple sources confirming CRISPR as central but also notes existing limitations needing further investigation despite overall positive outlook driven primarily because no other option has achieved similar levels across all criteria considered herein thus far discussed thoroughly enough warranting selection otherwise given constraints imposed
